notes: Small bridging file (10 decls, no sorries, no proofs > 30 lines) connecting the project's Isogeny.degree/separableDegree/inseparableDegree definitional API to mathlib's Field.finSepDegree/finInsepDegree/finrank. Three declarations use set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false without explanatory comments. The separableSubfield cluster (def + 2 trivial lemmas) appears parked/placeholder: separableSubfield_includes_pullbackRange is merely bot_le and function_field_over_separableSubfield_purely_inseparable carries an explicit Algebra.IsAlgebraic hypothesis that should be automatic for finite isogenies.
